widgets.title: Amount by Txn Type
widgets.description: Total transaction amount aggregated by transaction type.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "txn_type" AS label, CAST(SUM("amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY "txn_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Amount Distribution by Channel
widgets.description: Proportion of total transaction amounts grouped by channel
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "channel" AS label, CAST(SUM("amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY "channel" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Amount Over Posted Date
widgets.description: Daily total transaction amount aggregated over posted_date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('day', "posted_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(SUM("amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC

widgets.title: Running Balance Frequency Distribution
widgets.description: Frequency distribution of running balance values grouped into buckets of 1000 units.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(FLOOR("running_balance" / 1000) * 1000 AS VARCHAR) || ' - ' || CAST(FLOOR("running_balance" / 1000) * 1000 + 999 AS VARCHAR) AS bucket, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS count FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY CAST(SPLIT_PART(bucket, ' - ', 1) AS DOUBLE) ASC LIMIT 100

widgets.title: Txn Type × Channel Heatmap
widgets.description: Heatmap showing the total transaction amount aggregated by transaction type and channel.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "txn_type" AS row, "channel" AS col, CAST(SUM("amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY "txn_type", "channel" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Amount vs Running Balance Correlation
widgets.description: Scatter plot showing the correlation between transaction amount and running balance for banking transactions.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST("amount" AS DOUBLE) AS x, CAST("running_balance" AS DOUBLE) AS y FROM "t_banking_transactions" WHERE "amount" IS NOT NULL AND "running_balance" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000

widgets.title: Running Balance Volume Over Posted Date
widgets.description: Daily average running balance aggregated over posted_date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('day', "posted_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, AVG("running_balance") AS value FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Txn Type Ranked by Running Balance
widgets.description: Sum of running balances grouped by transaction type, ranked descending
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "txn_type" AS label, CAST(SUM("running_balance") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY "txn_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Txn Type Composition by Channel
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing the sum of transaction amounts by transaction type within each channel.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "channel" AS label, "txn_type" AS "group", CAST(SUM("amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Amount vs Running Balance by Txn Type
widgets.description: Comparison of total transaction amount and average running balance grouped by transaction type.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "txn_type" AS label, CAST(SUM("amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value1, CAST(AVG("running_balance") AS DOUBLE) AS value2 FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY "txn_type" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Txn Type Composition Over Posted Date
widgets.description: Stacked area chart showing the sum of transaction amounts by transaction type over each month based on posted_date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT date_trunc('month', "posted_date")::VARCHAR AS x, "txn_type" AS series, CAST(SUM("amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by Txn Type
widgets.description: Comparison of average amount, fraud rate, and dispute rate across different transaction types.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "txn_type" AS axis, CAST(AVG("amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_banking_transactions" GROUP BY "txn_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12
